_doc: Coverage sectional — Venn & Statement Conclusions. Original rows for official RRB NTPC syllabus coverage.

questions.stem_en: Statements: All trains are vehicles. Some vehicles are electric. Conclusions: I. Some trains may be electric. II. No train is electric. Which follows?
questions.stem_hi: Statements: All trains are vehicles. Some vehicles are electric. Conclusions: I. Some trains may be electric. II. No train is electric. कौन follow करता है?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Accepted conclusion II even though it reverses or overstates the given class relation.
options.trap_reason_hi: Conclusion II accept कर लिया जबकि यह given class relation को reverse/overstate करता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Treated the invalid reversed conclusion as valid along with the valid one.
options.trap_reason_hi: Invalid reversed conclusion को valid conclusion के साथ सही मान लिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Rejected the direct Venn implication from the two statements.
options.trap_reason_hi: दो statements से निकले direct Venn implication को reject कर दिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Draw the Venn relation from the two statements; Only possibility follows. Therefore, answer = Only possibility follows.
questions.explanation_concept_en: In statement-conclusion reasoning, do not reverse an all/some relation unless the statement permits it. Possibility conclusions are valid only when not contradicted. Final answer is Only possibility follows.
questions.explanation_method_hi: दो statements से Venn relation बनाइए; Only possibility follows। अतः answer = Only possibility follows।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Statement-conclusion में all/some relation को reverse नहीं करते जब तक statement allow न करे। Possibility conclusion contradiction न हो तभी valid है। Final answer Only possibility follows है।

questions.stem_en: In a Venn diagram, Students is fully inside Readers, and Singers partly overlaps Readers. Which statement is definitely true?
questions.stem_hi: Venn diagram में Students, Readers के अंदर है और Singers, Readers को partly overlap करता है। Definitely true statement कौन-सा है?

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Converted a partial overlap between Singers and Readers into full inclusion.
options.trap_reason_hi: Singers और Readers के partial overlap को full inclusion मान लिया।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Assumed separation between Students and Singers; the diagram does not guarantee that.
options.trap_reason_hi: Students और Singers को separate मान लिया; diagram यह guarantee नहीं करता।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Reversed the inclusion. Students inside Readers means all Students are Readers, not all Readers are Students.
options.trap_reason_hi: Inclusion reverse कर दिया। Students, Readers के अंदर है मतलब all Students are Readers, all Readers are Students नहीं।

questions.explanation_method_en: Students lies completely within Readers, so every Students is Readers. Therefore, answer = All Students are Readers.
questions.explanation_concept_en: A Venn diagram only gives guaranteed relations shown by full containment, separation, or overlap. Do not infer more than the diagram states. Final answer is All Students are Readers.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Students पूरी तरह Readers के अंदर है, इसलिए every Students, Readers है। अतः answer = All Students are Readers।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Venn diagram सिर्फ वही guaranteed relation देता है जो full containment, separation या overlap से दिखता है। Extra inference न करें। Final answer All Students are Readers है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Engineers lies completely within Graduates, so every Engineers is Graduates. Therefore, answer = All Engineers are Graduates.
questions.explanation_concept_en: A Venn diagram only gives guaranteed relations shown by full containment, separation, or overlap. Do not infer more than the diagram states. Final answer is All Engineers are Graduates.
